task_completion.description: Create a new folder named 'Scout-ILUG' in the email client
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder pane in the email client displays a folder exactly named 'Scout-ILUG'.

task_completion.description: Move 'ILUG' related emails from the Inbox to the 'Scout-ILUG' folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Scout-ILUG' folder is selected and contains ILUG-related emails (at least 5 emails should be visible in this folder).

task_completion.description: Star the original thread starters in the 'Scout-ILUG' folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Star/flag icons are activated on emails where the subject does NOT start with 'Re:' or 'RE:'. Note: Emails with subjects like '[ILUG] Re:' MUST be starred.

task_completion.description: Create a CSV file named 'ilug_candidates.csv' in the Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or text editor shows a file named 'ilug_candidates.csv' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: List the Name and Email Address of the starred email senders in the CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CSV file is open and contains rows formatted as 'Name, Email'. The number of rows should roughly match the number of starred emails.

task_completion.description: Draft a notification email to devrel@company.com with the correct subject
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email compose window is open (or saved in drafts) with 'devrel@company.com' in the 'To' field and 'ILUG Candidate List' in the 'Subject' field.

integrity.description: Agent used the email client GUI to move and star emails
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the email client interface being used to organize folders and click star icons, rather than terminal commands manipulating Maildir files directly.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI text editor or spreadsheet tool to create the CSV
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (e.g., gedit, mousepad) or spreadsheet application open with the CSV contents, rather than terminal echo/cat commands.

integrity.description: Agent used the email client to draft the notification
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the email client's native compose window being used to draft the message, not a terminal script or standalone text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target folder: 'Scout-ILUG'. CSV path: '/home/ga/Documents/ilug_candidates.csv'. Draft recipient: 'devrel@company.com'. Crucial grading quirks: 1) Emails with subjects starting with '[ILUG] Re:' MUST be starred, as the system only excludes subjects starting exactly with 'Re:' or 'RE:'. 2) The agent only needs to move at least 5 ILUG emails to the 'Scout-ILUG' folder to pass this step. 3) For the CSV file, verify that the total number of rows roughly matches the number of starred emails (+/- 2 rows); the actual names and email addresses do not need to be perfectly accurate.
